semantic.role: Service module for LLM configuration command orchestration, bridging CLI commands with infrastructure config/secrets stores and runtime service.
responsibilities: Resolves the target (global vs project) LLM configuration and secrets store for CLI commands based on scope and root directory.
Provides functions to set and clear persisted LLM values (provider, model, base URL, API key, mode) via targeted configStore and secretsStore interfaces.
Orchestrates saving of complete LLM setup values (provider, model, API key, mode, prompt policy) to the appropriate config and secrets stores.
Builds a LLM status view model by querying RuntimeService for resolved LLM settings and execution profiles.
Defines interfaces (LLMCommandTarget, LLMSetupValues, LLMStatusViewModel) and type (LLMScope) for consistent command structure and type safety.
Integrates with GlobalLLMConfig and GlobalLLMSecrets to handle global LLM configuration alongside project-level settings.
outOfScope: Direct configuration file parsing or disk I/O (delegated to infra modules).
Network requests or API calls to LLM providers.
User interface rendering or terminal output formatting.
Authentication or authorization beyond API key handling.
invariants: Must import infrastructure modules (Config, Secrets, GlobalLLMConfig, GlobalLLMSecrets) for persistence.
Must use RuntimeService for resolving runtime-level LLM settings.
Must not depend on UI frameworks or presentation layers.
If view-specific, should be located under src/services/view/ per architecture rules.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a dedicated service layer for LLM command operations that abstracts CLI logic from infrastructure details, enabling consistent setup and status reporting for both global and project scopes.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Transition from a type-definition-only module to a full service layer with orchestration functions for LLM configuration persistence and view model building, aligning with the v1.0.0 architectural governance release which emphasizes runtime orchestration in services.

semantic.driftReason: The previous semantic contract described this file as a pure type definition module, but the current implementation includes multiple exported functions with substantial orchestration logic (resolving targets, setting/clearing values, saving setup, building view model), transforming it into a service module with both type definitions and command orchestration.

English.role: Service module for LLM configuration command orchestration, bridging CLI commands with infrastructure config/secrets stores and runtime service.
responsibilities: Resolves the target (global vs project) LLM configuration and secrets store for CLI commands based on scope and root directory.
Provides functions to set and clear persisted LLM values (provider, model, base URL, API key, mode) via targeted configStore and secretsStore interfaces.
Orchestrates saving of complete LLM setup values (provider, model, API key, mode, prompt policy) to the appropriate config and secrets stores.
Builds a LLM status view model by querying RuntimeService for resolved LLM settings and execution profiles.
Defines interfaces (LLMCommandTarget, LLMSetupValues, LLMStatusViewModel) and type (LLMScope) for consistent command structure and type safety.
Integrates with GlobalLLMConfig and GlobalLLMSecrets to handle global LLM configuration alongside project-level settings.
outOfScope: Direct configuration file parsing or disk I/O (delegated to infra modules).
Network requests or API calls to LLM providers.
User interface rendering or terminal output formatting.
Authentication or authorization beyond API key handling.

Simplified Chinese.role: LLM 配置命令编排的服务模块，将 CLI 命令与基础设施配置/密钥存储及运行时服务进行桥接。
responsibilities: 根据作用域和根目录，为 CLI 命令解析目标（全局或项目）的 LLM 配置和密钥存储。
提供函数，通过指定的 configStore 和 secretsStore 接口设置和清除持久化的 LLM 值（提供商、模型、基础 URL、API 密钥、模式）。
编排完整的 LLM 设置值（提供商、模型、API 密钥、模式、提示策略）保存到相应的配置和密钥存储中。
通过查询 RuntimeService 获取已解析的 LLM 设置和执行配置文件，构建 LLM 状态视图模型。
定义接口（LLMCommandTarget、LLMSetupValues、LLMStatusViewModel）和类型（LLMScope），确保命令结构的一致性和类型安全。
与 GlobalLLMConfig 和 GlobalLLMSecrets 集成，处理全局 LLM 配置以及项目级别的设置。
outOfScope: 直接解析配置文件或磁盘 I/O（委托给基础设施模块）。
向 LLM 提供商发出的网络请求或 API 调用。
用户界面渲染或终端输出格式化。
除 API 密钥处理之外的认证或授权。

exports.name: resolveLLMTarget
setPersistedLLMValue
exports.signature:
setPersistedLLMValue(
  target: LLMCommandTarget,
  key: 'provider' | 'model' | 'base-url' | 'api-key' | 'mode',
  value: string | LLMMode,
)

exports.name: buildLLMStatusViewModel
